name: @representative/react-enterprise-app
description: React 19 TypeScript application shell using generated GraphQL contracts through an approved adapter.

readme.summary: React 19 TypeScript application shell using generated GraphQL contracts through an approved adapter.
responsibilities: Own the React application shell, route composition, and runtime bootstrapping
Consume GraphQL operations only through generated contract and adapter packages
Coordinate authentication, rendering mode, and application-level error boundaries
nonResponsibilities: Does not own domain policy logic
Does not define GraphQL schema contracts
Does not bypass public package exports or call vendor transport directly
usage: Use as the application entry package for browser-level vertical slices
Import feature packages through their public exports
Use generated GraphQL TypedDocumentNode operations through the adapter package
operationalNotes: Representative stack: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, React Router, GraphQL Code Generator, and TanStack Query or Apollo Client
Server Components are optional and only valid when the application runtime explicitly supports them
